headlines.headline: NBA Finals betting tips, DFS picks: Will Jalen Brunson come up big again in Game 3?
headlines.description: Andre Snellings breaks down Game 3 of the Finals between the Knicks and Spurs and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Knicks fans see surge in ticket prices for Finals games at MSG
headlines.description: Seeing the Knicks at Madison Square Garden in the Finals is clearly the hottest ticket in town.

headlines.headline: MSG security tightened ahead of President Donald Trump's trip
headlines.description: Donald Trump's appearance at Game 3 of the NBA Finals brings strict security measures that will require fans to navigate an extensive safety perimeter around Madison Square Garden and an expected lengthy wait to enter the building.

headlines.headline: Raptors GM Webster extended, promoted to executive vice president
headlines.description: The Toronto Raptors have signed general manager Bobby Webster to a multiyear extension and promoted him to executive vice president, the team announced Monday.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's what our NBA insiders are hearing, including the latest on where Giannis Antetokounmpo could end up this offseason.

headlines.headline: Broncos' Cooper pleads not guilty; trial set for late July
headlines.description: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper pleaded not guilty Monday morning in a Douglas County (Colorado) courtroom to misdemeanor domestic violence charges.

headlines.headline: The 2026 fantasy football injury report: What to know before draft season starts
headlines.description: Stephania Bell breaks down the status of fantasy stars heading into the 2026 season, from QBs to TEs.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football buzz: Don't be surprised if a Dolphin other than Achane becomes fantasy-relevant
headlines.description: Eric Karabell explains what to expect from a Dolphins offense with low expectations.

headlines.headline: NFL offseason 2026: OTA, minicamp dates for all 32 teams

headlines.headline: How June 1 turned into a blockbuster trade day in the NFL
headlines.description: More than 15 coaches, players and execs shed light on the back-to-back trades that happened on a key June day.

headlines.headline: Can Titans' Pollard hit 1,000 yards for a fifth straight year?
headlines.description: Only Tennessee's Tony Pollard and Baltimore's Derrick Henry have eclipsed 1,000 rushing yards each of the past four seasons.

headlines.headline: Ranking every dog name and pun from the 2026 'Stanley Pup'
headlines.description: The NHL's "Stanley Pup" is a friendly competition featuring adoptable rescue dogs that's airing in the U.S. and Canada on Monday.

headlines.headline: How the Hurricanes handled a Stanley Cup playoff baby boom
headlines.description: Three Carolina defensemen have recently expanded their families. Here's how the team has helped them juggle the new responsibilities.

headlines.headline: Vegas brings 2-1 series lead into game 4 against Carolina
headlines.description: Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: As Vegas eyes Game 4, Golden Knights applaud Brayden McNabb
headlines.description: Vegas defenseman Brayden McNabb played Game 3 of the Stanley Cup Finals with at least two dozen stitches in his face that forced the Golden Knights veteran to wear a caged helmet for the first time since his youth hockey days in Davidson, Saskatchewan.

headlines.headline: Brind'Amour: No decisions yet on Hurricanes' Game 4 lineup
headlines.description: Hurricanes coach Rod Brind'Amour said he doesn't "anticipate a lot of changes" to his Game 4 lineup after his team fell behind 2-1 in its Stanley Cup Final series against the Golden Knights.

headlines.headline: Connor McDavid ties Wayne Gretzky with 5th Ted Lindsay Award
headlines.description: Connor McDavid of the Oilers has won the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's most outstanding player as voted by his peers.
